learningObjectives: Recognise and use twelve Starters colour and clothes words.
Use adjective + noun order in short phrases (a red shirt, blue trousers).
Describe clothes with It is / They are + colour.
Read about Mai getting dressed and match colours to clothes.
Listen for colour and clothes words in dialogues with Mum.
Write and speak short sentences about clothes and colours.
grammarFocus: Adjective + noun order: a red shirt

vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Áo sơ mi của tôi màu đỏ.
Giày của Nam màu xanh dương.
Váy của Mai màu xanh lá.
Mặc áo sơ mi đỏ vào.
Quần của tôi màu xanh dương.
Váy của cô ấy màu xanh lá.
Mai có áo khoác màu đen.

grammarReference.structure: Adjective + noun order: a red shirt
grammarReference.explanation: Trong tiếng Anh, màu sắc đứng TRƯỚC danh từ: a red shirt, blue trousers, a green dress.
commonMistakes: a shirt red (×) → a red shirt (✓)

grammarReference.structure: Verb be for description: It is / They are + adjective
grammarReference.explanation: Dùng is/are + màu để mô tả: It is green (váy). They are blue (giày — số nhiều).
commonMistakes: The shoes is green (×) → The shoes are green (✓)
It are red (×) → It is red (✓)

grammarReference.explanation: What colour is your dress? — hỏi màu. Trả lời: It is green. / My dress is green.
commonMistakes: What colour are your dress? (×) → What colour is your dress? (✓)
It green is (×) → It is green (✓)

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Colours
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise and use red, blue, green, yellow, black and white in short sentences.

exercises.title: Learn: Basic Colours
exercises.instructions: Read each sentence. Choose the best colour.

questions.questionText: Apples and fire are often _____.
questions.explanation: Red (đỏ) — màu phổ biến của táo và lửa.

questions.questionText: The sky on a sunny day is _____.
questions.explanation: Blue (xanh dương) — màu bầu trời.

questions.questionText: Grass and leaves are usually _____.
questions.explanation: Green (xanh lá) — màu của cỏ và lá.

questions.questionText: The sun and bananas are often _____.
questions.explanation: Yellow (vàng) — màu mặt trời và chuối.

exercises.title: Practice: Match Colours
exercises.instructions: Match each colour to its meaning.

questions.questionText: Match the colours to their Vietnamese meanings.
questions.explanation: Mỗi màu khớp nghĩa tiếng Việt. black/white hay bị đảo.

exercises.title: Check: Colours Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Mai's dress in the story is _____.
questions.explanation: Green — bài đọc: She puts on a green dress.

questions.questionText: Snow and milk are usually _____.
questions.explanation: White (trắng) — tuyết và sữa.

questions.questionText: Night and Mai's jacket are _____.
questions.explanation: Black — Mai has a black jacket.

exercises.title: Apply: Colours in Sentences
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct colour.

questions.questionText: Complete: My shirt is [0]. | The sky is [1]. | Anna's hat is [2].
questions.explanation: red (áo); blue (trời/Nam's shoes); yellow (mũ Anna).

content.template: My shirt is [0]. The sky is [1]. Anna's hat is [2].

exercises.title: Review: Colours Mix
exercises.instructions: Mixed review. Choose carefully.

questions.questionText: Which word is a colour, not clothes?
questions.explanation: Green là màu. Shirt và dress là quần áo.

questions.questionText: Mai's shoes are _____.
questions.explanation: Yellow — Her shoes are yellow.

questions.questionText: Nam's shoes are _____.
questions.explanation: Blue — Her brother Nam has blue shoes.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Clothes
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise shirt, trousers, dress, shoes, hat and jacket in context.

exercises.title: Learn: Clothes Words
exercises.instructions: Read each clue. Choose the best clothes word.

questions.questionText: You wear this on your top. It has buttons.
questions.explanation: Shirt (áo sơ mi) — mặc trên thân.

questions.questionText: You wear these on your legs. They are long.
questions.explanation: Trousers (quần dài) — mặc ở chân.

questions.questionText: Girls often wear this one piece.
questions.explanation: Dress (váy) — trang phục một mảnh.

questions.questionText: You wear these on your feet.
questions.explanation: Shoes (giày) — đi trên chân.

exercises.title: Practice: Match Clothes
exercises.instructions: Match each word to what you wear it on.

questions.questionText: Match clothes to where you wear them.
questions.explanation: Hat=đầu; jacket=thân ngoài; shoes=chân; shirt=thân trên.

exercises.title: Check: Clothes Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: You wear this on your head when it is sunny.
questions.explanation: Hat (mũ) — đội trên đầu.

questions.questionText: When it is cold, you wear a warm _____.
questions.explanation: Jacket (áo khoác) — mặc ngoài khi lạnh.

questions.questionText: Mai puts on a green _____.
questions.explanation: Dress — She puts on a green dress.

exercises.title: Apply: Clothes in Sentences
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct clothes word.

questions.questionText: Complete: Put on your red [0]. | My [1] are yellow. | She wears a white [2].
questions.explanation: shirt; shoes; hat — theo câu chuyện Mai.

content.template: Put on your red [0]. My [1] are yellow. She wears a white [2].

exercises.title: Review: Clothes Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Which word is NOT clothes?
questions.explanation: Blue là màu. Shirt, dress, shoes là quần áo.

questions.questionText: Mai's black _____ keeps her warm.
questions.explanation: Jacket — She wears a black jacket.

questions.questionText: Blue _____ are in Mai's cupboard.
questions.explanation: Trousers — blue trousers in cupboard.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Colours and Clothes Mix
lessons.learningObjective: Use hat, jacket, black and white with other colour and clothes words.

exercises.title: Learn: Colour + Clothes
exercises.instructions: Read each phrase. Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: a _____ hat
questions.explanation: White — Mai wears a white hat.

questions.questionText: a black _____
questions.explanation: Jacket — Mai has a black jacket.

questions.questionText: Anna wears a _____ hat.
questions.explanation: Yellow — Anna wears a yellow hat.

questions.questionText: The shop has _____ shoes.
questions.explanation: Black — The shoes are black (shopping script).

exercises.title: Practice: Match Colour + Item
exercises.instructions: Match each clothes item to its colour in Mai's story.

questions.questionText: Match Mai's clothes to their colours.
questions.explanation: Shirt=red; dress=green; shoes=yellow; hat=white; jacket=black.

exercises.title: Check: Colours and Clothes Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Which pair is correct?
questions.explanation: a red shirt — màu trước danh từ.

questions.questionText: Mai's _____ is black.
questions.explanation: Jacket — black jacket.

questions.questionText: They buy _____ trousers at the shop.
questions.explanation: White — We buy white trousers (shopping script).

exercises.title: Apply: Complete Colour + Clothes
exercises.instructions: Complete with colour or clothes words.

questions.questionText: Complete: a [0] jacket | [1] trousers | a [2] hat
questions.explanation: blue (shop); white (shop); yellow (Anna).

exercises.title: Review: Full Vocabulary Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Which item does Mai NOT wear in the story?
questions.explanation: Mai wears shirt, dress, shoes, hat, jacket. Blue trousers are in cupboard.

choices.text: blue trousers (she keeps them, wears dress)

questions.questionText: Grass is green. The sun is often _____.
questions.explanation: Yellow — mặt trời thường vàng.

questions.questionText: You put _____ on before you go outside in the rain.
questions.explanation: Jacket — áo khoác che mưa/lạnh.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Adjective + Noun
lessons.learningObjective: Use colour adjectives before nouns: a red shirt, blue trousers.

exercises.title: Learn: Colour Before Noun
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct word order.

questions.questionText: Which phrase is correct?
questions.explanation: A red shirt — màu đứng TRƯỚC danh từ trong tiếng Anh.

questions.questionText: Mai has _____ .
questions.explanation: Blue trousers — màu + danh từ.

questions.questionText: Anna wears _____ .
questions.explanation: A yellow hat — a + màu + danh từ số ít.

questions.questionText: Which phrase describes Mai's jacket?
questions.explanation: A black jacket — màu trước jacket.

exercises.title: Practice: Adjective + Noun Gap Fill
exercises.instructions: Complete with the correct colour + noun order.

questions.questionText: Complete: a [0] dress | [1] shoes | a [2] hat
questions.explanation: green dress; yellow shoes; white hat — màu trước danh từ.

exercises.title: Check: Adjective + Noun Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer. No hints.

questions.questionText: Mum says: Put on your _____ .
questions.explanation: Red shirt — màu trước shirt (listening script).

questions.questionText: Which phrase is wrong?
questions.explanation: Dress green sai — phải green dress hoặc a green dress.

choices.distractorNote: Đúng — shoes số nhiều không cần a

questions.questionText: At the shop: a _____ jacket
questions.explanation: Blue jacket — Look at this blue jacket.

exercises.title: Apply: Order Adjective + Noun
exercises.instructions: Put the words in the correct order.

questions.questionText: Make: a / red / shirt
questions.explanation: A red shirt — a + màu + danh từ.

questions.questionText: Make: blue / trousers
questions.explanation: Blue trousers — màu + danh từ (không cần a).

exercises.title: Review: Adjective + Noun Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form.

questions.questionText: Best phrase for Nam's shoes:
questions.explanation: Blue shoes — màu trước danh từ.

questions.questionText: I like the _____ shirt.
questions.explanation: Yellow shirt — the + màu + danh từ.

questions.questionText: We buy _____ trousers.
questions.explanation: White trousers — màu trước trousers.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Verb Be for Description
lessons.learningObjective: Use It is / They are + colour to describe clothes.

exercises.title: Learn: It is / They are + Colour
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form.

questions.questionText: My dress _____ green.
questions.explanation: Is — dress số ít → It is / My dress is.

questions.questionText: My shoes _____ yellow.
questions.explanation: Are — shoes số nhiều → are.

questions.questionText: Best answer: What colour is your hat? — _____
questions.explanation: It is white. — trả lời màu mũ.

questions.questionText: The trousers _____ blue.
questions.explanation: Are — trousers luôn số nhiều → are.

exercises.title: Practice: is/are + Colour Gap Fill
exercises.instructions: Complete with is or are and a colour.

questions.questionText: Complete: My dress [0] green. | My shoes [1] yellow. | It [2] white.
questions.explanation: is (dress); are (shoes); is (hat/it).

content.template: My dress [0] green. My shoes [1] yellow. It [2] white.

exercises.title: Check: Verb Be Description Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form. No hints.

questions.questionText: Mai's jacket _____ black.
questions.explanation: Is — jacket số ít.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is correct?
questions.explanation: They are blue. — shoes/trousers số nhiều.

questions.questionText: "It is green!" says Mai. "It" means her _____.
questions.explanation: Dress — What colour is your dress? It is green!

exercises.title: Apply: Order Description Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in the correct order.

questions.questionText: Make: It / is / green.
questions.explanation: It is green. — mô tả màu một vật.

questions.questionText: Make: My / shoes / are / yellow.
questions.explanation: My shoes are yellow. — số nhiều + are.

exercises.title: Review: Verb Be Description Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form.

questions.questionText: Nam's shoes _____ blue.
questions.explanation: Are — shoes số nhiều.

questions.questionText: What colour _____ your dress?
questions.explanation: Is — dress số ít → What colour is…?

questions.questionText: The shop shoes _____ black.
questions.explanation: Are — shoes luôn số nhiều.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Mixed Grammar
lessons.learningObjective: Use adjective + noun and is/are descriptions together in context.

exercises.title: Learn: Mixed Patterns
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct word or phrase.

questions.questionText: _____ colour is your dress?
questions.explanation: What colour — câu hỏi màu chuẩn.

questions.questionText: She has _____ .
questions.explanation: A blue dress — màu trước danh từ.

questions.questionText: Your dress _____ yellow.
questions.explanation: Is — dress số ít (listening script).

questions.questionText: Best reply: What colour are your shoes? — _____
questions.explanation: They are green. — shoes số nhiều.

exercises.title: Practice: Mixed Gap Fill
exercises.instructions: Complete with What, is, are or a colour.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] colour is your hat? | It [1] white. | My shoes [2] black.
questions.explanation: What; is; are — hỏi màu và mô tả.

content.template: [0] colour is your hat? It [1] white. My shoes [2] black.

exercises.title: Check: Mixed Grammar Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is correct?
questions.explanation: Her dress is green. — Her + danh từ + is + màu.

questions.questionText: Mum: Is your hat white? Mai: _____
questions.explanation: Yes. It is white. — khẳng định + mô tả.

questions.questionText: I like the red hat. The hat _____ red.
questions.explanation: Is — hat số ít.

exercises.title: Apply: Order Mixed Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order.

questions.questionText: Make: What / colour / is / your / dress?
questions.explanation: What colour is your dress? — câu hỏi màu.

questions.questionText: Make: Put / on / your / red / shirt.
questions.explanation: Put on your red shirt. — mệnh lệnh + màu + danh từ.

exercises.title: Review: Mixed Grammar
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct answer.

questions.questionText: Anna's hat _____ yellow.
questions.explanation: Is — hat số ít.

questions.questionText: Which question asks about colour?
questions.explanation: What colour is your dress? — hỏi màu.

questions.questionText: Mai wears a white hat. The hat _____ white.
questions.explanation: Is — hat số ít, lặp lại mô tả.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Match Colours and Objects
lessons.learningObjective: Read about Mai getting dressed and match colours to clothes.

exercises.title: Learn: Read Mai's Colours
exercises.instructions: Read the text. Then answer the questions.

passage.title: Mai Getting Dressed
passage.text:
Mai wakes up on a sunny morning. She opens her cupboard.

Mai has a red shirt and blue trousers. She puts on a green dress.
Her shoes are yellow. She wears a white hat and a black jacket.

"What colour is your dress?" asks Mum. "It is green!" says Mai.

Her brother Nam has blue shoes. Her friend Anna wears a yellow hat.
They look at Mai. "You look nice!" says Anna. Mai is happy!

questions.questionText: What is the main idea of the text?
questions.explanation: Bài về Mai mặc quần áo nhiều màu sắc buổi sáng.

choices.text: Mai gets dressed in colourful clothes.

choices.distractorNote: Unit số — không phải bài này

questions.questionText: What colour is Mai's dress?
questions.explanation: She puts on a green dress.

exercises.title: Practice: More Colours in the Text
exercises.instructions: Read again. Match colours to items.

passage.title: Mai Getting Dressed
passage.text:
Mai wakes up on a sunny morning. She opens her cupboard.

Mai has a red shirt and blue trousers. She puts on a green dress.
Her shoes are yellow. She wears a white hat and a black jacket.

"What colour is your dress?" asks Mum. "It is green!" says Mai.

Her brother Nam has blue shoes. Her friend Anna wears a yellow hat.
They look at Mai. "You look nice!" says Anna. Mai is happy!

questions.questionText: Mai's shirt in the cupboard is _____.
questions.explanation: A red shirt — in her cupboard.

questions.questionText: Mai's shoes are _____.
questions.explanation: Her shoes are yellow.

exercises.title: Check: Match Colours Quiz
exercises.instructions: Read carefully. Choose the best answer.

Her brother Nam has blue shoes. Her friend Anna wears a yellow hat.
They look at Mai. "You look nice!" says Anna. Mai is happy!

questions.questionText: Mai's hat is _____.
questions.explanation: She wears a white hat.

questions.questionText: Mai's jacket is _____.
questions.explanation: A black jacket.

exercises.title: Apply: Match Colours to Clothes
exercises.instructions: Use the text. Match each item to its colour.

questions.questionText: Blue trousers are in Mai's _____.
questions.explanation: She opens her cupboard — blue trousers there.

questions.questionText: Which colour is NOT on Mai's body in the story?
questions.explanation: Mai wears green dress, yellow shoes, white hat, black jacket. Red shirt stays in cupboard.

questions.questionText: Anna's hat is _____.
questions.explanation: Anna wears a yellow hat.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Outfit Descriptions
lessons.learningObjective: Read outfit descriptions using It is / They are + colour.

exercises.instructions: Find what Mai is wearing in the text.

passage.title: Mai Getting Dressed
passage.text:
Mai wakes up on a sunny morning. She opens her cupboard.

Mai has a red shirt and blue trousers. She puts on a green dress.
Her shoes are yellow. She wears a white hat and a black jacket.

"What colour is your dress?" asks Mum. "It is green!" says Mai.

Her brother Nam has blue shoes. Her friend Anna wears a yellow hat.
They look at Mai. "You look nice!" says Anna. Mai is happy!

questions.questionText: Mai wakes up on a _____ morning.
questions.explanation: On a sunny morning.

questions.questionText: They look at Mai. "They" are _____ and Anna.
questions.explanation: Nam and Anna look at Mai.

questions.questionText: Complete: Mai wears a green dress, yellow shoes, a white hat and a _____ jacket.
questions.explanation: Black jacket — từ bài đọc.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Getting Dressed
lessons.learningObjective: Listen to Mai and Mum and identify colours and clothes while getting dressed.

exercises.title: Learn: Listen — Getting Dressed
exercises.instructions: Listen to the conversation. Choose the correct answer.

lines.text: Put on your red shirt, Mai.

lines.speaker: Mai
lines.text: OK, Mum. And my blue trousers?

lines.speaker: Mai
lines.text: My jacket is black. I am ready!

script.audioNotes: Clear, slow delivery with short pauses. Total duration approx. 35 seconds.

questions.questionText: What does Mum tell Mai to put on first?
questions.explanation: Put on your red shirt.

questions.questionText: What colour are Mai's shoes?
questions.explanation: Your shoes are green.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Write About Clothes and Colours

exercises.title: Learn: Clothes + Colour Frames

questions.questionText: Complete: My shirt [0] red. | My shoes [1] blue. | It [2] green.
questions.explanation: is (shirt); are (shoes); is (dress/it).

content.template: My shirt [0] red. My shoes [1] blue. It [2] green.

exercises.title: Practice: Order Clothes Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order.

questions.questionText: Make: My / dress / is / green.
questions.explanation: My dress is green. — viết mô tả váy.

questions.questionText: Make: a / red / shirt
questions.explanation: A red shirt — màu trước danh từ.

exercises.title: Check: Write About Your Clothes
exercises.instructions: Write short answers. Use 1–5 words for each answer.

content.taskDescription: Write about your clothes and their colours using words from the unit.
prompts: 1. Write one clothes word (shirt, dress, shoes…).
successCriteria: Uses at least one clothes word
Uses at least one colour word
Spelling of core words is recognisable

modelAnswer.text: shirt red My shirt is red. My shoes are blue.

grammar.criteria: Dùng is/are + màu hoặc màu + danh từ đúng thứ tự.

vocabulary.criteria: Dùng từ màu và quần áo trong unit.

organization.criteria: Câu ngắn rõ ràng; trả lời đủ phần.

taskAchievement.criteria: Hoàn thành nhiệm vụ; tối thiểu 5 từ (Starters).

questions.questionText: Write your response following the task.
questions.explanation: Chấm theo rubric. Bài mẫu cho thấy độ dài và nội dung mong đợi.

questions.explanation: A white hat — a + màu + danh từ.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Talk About Clothes and Colours
lessons.learningObjective: Answer simple questions about clothes and colours with short phrases.

exercises.title: Learn: What to Say About Clothes
exercises.instructions: Choose the best thing to say.

content.sceneDescription: Mai's bedroom on a sunny morning. Mai is eight. She has a red shirt and blue trousers in her cupboard. She wears a green dress, yellow shoes, a white hat and a black jacket. Her brother Nam has blue shoes. Her friend Anna wears a yellow hat. Mum helps Mai get dressed.

questions.questionText: Someone asks: What colour is your dress? You say:
questions.explanation: It is green. / My dress is green.

questions.questionText: Someone asks: What are you wearing on your feet? You say:
questions.explanation: Shoes. / Yellow shoes. / My shoes are yellow.

exercises.title: Practice: Clothes Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best reply.

content.sceneDescription: Mai's bedroom on a sunny morning. Mai is eight. She has a red shirt and blue trousers in her cupboard. She wears a green dress, yellow shoes, a white hat and a black jacket. Her brother Nam has blue shoes. Her friend Anna wears a yellow hat. Mum helps Mai get dressed.

questions.questionText: Mum asks: Is your hat white? You say:
questions.explanation: Yes. It is white.

questions.questionText: Friend asks: Do you have a jacket? You say:
questions.explanation: Yes. My jacket is black.

exercises.title: Check: Talk About Your Clothes

content.prompt: The examiner will ask you about your clothes and colours. Answer in short phrases.
content.sceneDescription: Scene: Mai's bedroom on a sunny morning. Mai is eight. She has a red shirt, blue trousers, a green dress, yellow shoes, a white hat and a black jacket. Her brother Nam has blue shoes. Her friend Anna wears a yellow hat. Mum helps Mai get dressed.
followUpQuestions: What are you wearing on your feet?
Do you have a hat? What colour is it?
What colour are your trousers or dress?
Say one sentence: My shoes are _____.

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Từ màu (red, blue, green…) và quần áo (shirt, dress, shoes…) nghe được rõ.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Trả lời bằng từ hoặc cụm ngắn; không im lặng quá lâu.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Dùng is/are + màu hoặc màu + danh từ trong ít nhất hai câu trả lời.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Dùng ít nhất ba từ vựng unit đúng nghĩa.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

questions.questionText: Say one clothes word + colour. You say:

exercises.instructions: Choose the best spoken reply.

questions.questionText: What colour are your shoes? You say:

questions.questionText: Point to your hat and say:
questions.explanation: A white hat. / My hat is white.

questions.questionText: Mum says: Put on your red shirt. You repeat:
questions.explanation: Put on your red shirt. — lặp mệnh lệnh.

content.prompt: The examiner asks about clothes and colours at a shop with Mai and Mum.
content.sceneDescription: Scene: Mai and Mum are at a clothes shop. Mum shows a blue jacket. Mai likes a yellow shirt. The shoes are black. There is a red hat. They buy white trousers. Mai's dress at home is green.
followUpQuestions: What does Mai like — the shirt or the shoes?
What colour are the shoes in the shop?

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Từ màu (red, blue, green…) và quần áo (shirt, dress, shoes…) nghe được rõ.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Trả lời bằng từ hoặc cụm ngắn; không im lặng quá lâu.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Dùng is/are + màu hoặc màu + danh từ trong ít nhất hai câu trả lời.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Dùng ít nhất ba từ vựng unit đúng nghĩa.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Quick Shop Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase for each situation.

questions.questionText: Mum buys trousers. You say the colour:
questions.explanation: White trousers.

questions.questionText: Thank Mum for shopping. You say:
questions.explanation: Thank you, Mum!

exercises.title: Review: Shopping Speaking Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the best reply.

questions.questionText: At the shop, shoes are _____. You say:
questions.explanation: Black. / They are black.

questions.questionText: Say one sentence with jacket + colour. You say:
questions.explanation: A blue jacket. / The jacket is blue.

questions.questionText: Mum says you have many colours. You say:
questions.explanation: Yes! / I have many colours today!
